heading_content_part: Log DataI want to inform you that whenever you use my Service, in a case of anerror in the app I collect data and information (through third party products) on your phonecalled Log Data. This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol (“IP”) address,device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing my Service,the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics.

decoder_heading: Cookies
ident_heading: Cookies
heading_content_part: CookiesCookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers. Theseare sent to your browser from the websites that you visit and are stored on your device's internal memory.

decoder_heading: This Service does not use these “cookies” explicitly
ident_heading: This Service does not use these “cookies” explicitly
heading_content_part: This Service does not use these “cookies” explicitly. However, the app may use third party code and librariesthat use “cookies” to collect information and improve their services. You have the option to eitheraccept or refuse these cookies and know when a cookie is being sent to your device. If you choose torefuse our cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of this Service.
